text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation here. The stark lighting, the clean lines of the architecture, and the glass wall dividing spaces summon thoughts about boundaries—between public and private, old and new, known and unknown. As I observe the R+D space inside, I sense that this place is a node of inquiry, where ideas are allowed to incubate. The visual interplay of color and text beckons me to contemplate the spirit of research: seeking, doubting, learning. I wonder how the inventions incubated here will ripple outward into the world.
